hypothesis: H8: DQPSK sim->real de-risk — stress dq_p10n512_rs127 + N=1024 rungs over flutter/SNR/AAC/seed axes

recommended_master8_rungs.note: byte-exact on every stress axis incl. aac96+combo
passes pre-registered safety matrix (0.30 flutter, -2 dB, >=5/6 seeds)
lenient margin only — experimental, expect possible loss

verdict.gate_def: PASS: net>=700 survives strict safety matrix; PARTIAL: 562-700 survives, or >=700 fails only extreme axes (flutter050/snr_m4); else FAIL
verdict.gate_verdict_note: PASS: dq_p10n512_rs127 (933.8), dq_p10n1024_rs223 (819.9) and dq_p10n1024_rs191 (702.2) all >=700 net and byte-exact through the full pre-registered safety matrix (flutter 0.30 strict 3/3, -2 dB strict 3/3, nominal 6/6 seeds) AND all extreme axes. Residual risk is the unvalidated sim->real phase transfer itself, which no sim stress can close.

validation.h4_reproduction: nominal seeds 0-2 of all 4 configs reproduce h4_dqpsk_results.json raw BER bit-exactly (12/12 cells) — channel path identical to channel_v2(aac=True)

knob_liveness.method: same seed, same input through channel_v2: rel RMS diff of output
knob_liveness.conclusion: flutter/SNR overrides propagate; flat BER across axes is genuine DQPSK robustness (pilot dtau tracking + differential encoding absorb flutter; binding adversary is the seed-dependent diffuse reverb, unchanged across axes)

validation.ws_control: run_control_rung seeds {0,1}: BER 0.0136 exact / 0.0415 fail — matches wave-1 adjudicated outcome

margin_summary.note: no breaking point found inside the tested envelope (flutter 0.50 = 3.3x nominal residual, -4 dB SNR, AAC 96k, flutter0.30+(-2dB) combo); max_cw_failed=0 in all 96 cells

recommended_master8_rungs_final.why: N=1024 PHY worst stressed BER 0.38%, RS t=18.8% bytes (~50x margin); beats 561.8 baseline even if real phase noise is several times worse than sim
same near-error-free N=1024 PHY, thinner RS (t=6.3%, ~16x margin); survived every axis incl. extremes; substitute dq_p10n1024_rs191 (702.2, ~28x) if a more conservative target is preferred

H4 winner; survived all axes but least PHY margin (worst BER 4.0% vs 25.1% RS capacity, ~6x) and shorter N=512 symbol is more reverb-ISI-exposed — the rung most at risk from an unmodeled sim->real phase gap
